Task: You're a senior data scientist how has to improve my workflow
You can change my project whatever you like
Dataset is credit risk which is small so your main goal is good value of rmse (other metric) 

Current setup:
you'll see in mlflow.ipynb

Tools:
MLflow, Optuna, etc by your choice 

Questions:
1. How should I structure this project?

Output format:
- Recommended workflow
- Tracking strategy
- Common mistakes
